stale_acknowledged.reason: tests cover opposite branches of retry-on-autofix control flow (retry path with 4 mocked git calls and stage call_count==2 vs clean path with 3 mocked git calls and stage call_count==1) -- collapsing them would obscure the call-sequence verification that is the whole point

ambiguous_distinct_literals -- 10 render_text success-path tests across 6 files target 6 different renderer SUTs imported from different modules (branch_text/clone_text/commit_text/pr_text/push_text/tag_text.render_text), each producing a tool-specific prefix and body (git_branch vs git_clone vs git_commit vs git_pr vs git_push vs git_tag) over its own data dict shape -- a cross-file fold would erase which renderer is under test, and the intra-file pairs (clone with/without path, pr auto/no-auto merge, push upstream-set/existing, tag full/breaking-not-pushed) feed distinct literals exercising opposite branches
